metadata.description: Opt-in, diff-aware commit-boundary enforcement of the Living Docs mechanical invariants.

plugins.name: living-docs-enforcer
plugins.description: OPT-IN enforcement of the Living Docs mechanical invariants at the git-commit boundary. Recommended for teams that want the docs floor enforced, not just advised. Bundles a self-contained copy of the living-docs skill and a PreToolUse hook that runs lint-docs.sh in diff-aware --ratchet mode on git commit (blocks NEW violations, grandfathers legacy debt). Default is block; downgrade with LIVING_DOCS_ENFORCE=warn.
